response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings roughly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP frameworks at re:cinq), which shows technical curiosity. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role is a director-level IC position requiring demonstrated AI thought leadership, cloud platform expertise, and a track record of advising strategic enterprise customers — none of which are evident in the resume. His AI exposure is shallow and recent, his cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than architectural depth, and his career arc is that of a senior individual contributor focused on execution, not strategic advisory or technical evangelism at scale.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous, diverse software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework development, signaling early-mover awareness of agentic AI tooling
Entrepreneurial background founding and maintaining GISCollective, plus a history of public workshops and conference talks demonstrating knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML or related field; both degrees are undergraduate-level and neither is AI-focused
AI engagement is very recent (April 2025 onward) and operational rather than strategic — no demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products or platforms at meaningful scale
Career profile is a hands-on Staff/Senior Engineer, not a director-level technical strategist with experience advising enterprise customers or shaping multi-year AI platform roadmaps
